quote_of_day.text:
>>9865
Lundia is a failed shithole eith average 76IQ, we have trash human capital, rest everything is just a consequence of this.
US is great because it has great people.
quote_of_day.name: Anon
quote_of_day.topic: Cynical views on India, human capital

articles.title: Weather on the board today
articles.body:
A low-pressure system of misogyny moved into the board's Discourse section, bringing with it a downpour of claims that women are 'born slaves' and seek to be 'tamed' by 'alpha males'.

This front was marked by assertions that women only resist weak men and are content to be subservient to dominant figures. A scattered drizzle of caste speculation occurred in two separate threads.

One anon attempted to guess the caste of the original poster, while another thread involved users sharing guesses about caste and region.

These threads represented a series of weak cold fronts that brought brief but intense bursts of discussion.

A high-pressure system of anti-Hindu sentiment also made an appearance, with one anon claiming that Hinduism is the root cause of India's problems and advocating for the adoption of Islam.

This viewpoint was not widely discussed, but it did contribute to the overall sense of overcast skies in the board's Notices section.

articles.title: Anon Posts Bizarre Narrative Involving Various Characters
articles.body:
Anon kicked off the thread with a two-word post: 'its time'. One anon responded with a lengthy, graphic narrative involving several characters, including BDL, jaggu, khanachad, and others.

The anon described a series of violent and sexual scenarios, including BDL whipping out a large penis and thrusting it, and jaggu getting sariya'd. Another anon replied with a link to a random website, seemingly unrelated to the conversation.

A third anon asked if a person named khana anon was an actual individual or just a random person.

A respondent then provided a numbered list describing a series of events, including khanachad getting sariya'd and awkward goat cutting herself. Anon also joked about a 'based ranking' of characters, with Sariya, Jaggu, and Gorimem at the top.

Another poster provided a status update on a fictional scenario, stating that 6 people were dead and 18 remained. A subsequent post expressed sympathy for a character named Noo atul, with one anon stating that they 'deserved better'.

The thread also involved requests for links and clarification on certain characters, with one anon asking for a link to a previous post and another inquiring about the identity of a person named Atul Subhash.

articles.title: Anon Claims Women Are 'Born Slaves', Want to Be 'Tamed' by 'Alpha Males'
articles.body:
Anon posted that 'Foids love being oppressed' and 'are happy to be slaves of alphas.' They claimed women 'cry about non-existent oppression' by Hindu men but support hijab.

Anon stated that women 'only worth is their womb' and that 'low iq randijeeta go for mullah for freedom and love only to become a child breeding machine.' Another anon replied that women 'want to be slave' and that 'it's basic biology.' Anon also claimed that 'Hindu should learn from muslims.

ISLAM IS ALWAYS RIGHT ABOUT WOMEN.' They suggested adopting 'good qualities of your enemy.' Anon argued that women 'love being slaves' and that 'muzzies are smart, they keep their wombs in check.' Some anons discussed Bollywood's portrayal of Muslims, with one stating that it 'still pushes muslim propaganda, just more subtle now.' Anon joked that 'gobar nahi sudhrega phir bhi, gobar ko real wala oppress karna padega.' Anon called for the return of 'ghunghat', stating that 'pajeetas don't deserve freedom, they themselves don't want freedom.' Another anon offered, 'Cry more pajeeta.

Stop simping for hijab, you can be my ghunghat wali.'

articles.title: Anon tries to guess OP's caste
articles.body:
Anon posted 'Guess my caste' as the original post. Another anon replied with an image link, seemingly attempting to provide a hint or clue.

One anon suggested the OP is likely a Chamartha or a Rajchoot, calling them 'randike low iq'. A respondent joked about Rajputs being classified as OBC, saying 'waah pajeetia waah, jai bhim'.

Anon also made a comment about the OP having '4 legs with different skin tones'. A respondent reacted with 'got bit by a radioactive spidernigger'. Multiple anon users started guessing the OP's caste.

Some said 'Chamar', while one user suggested 'uc muslim'. Anon also provided a hint saying 'Hint : South Indian'. The conversation involved several users incorrectly guessing and being told they were wrong.

One user claimed to have 'Caught the android'. The tone remained lighthearted with name-calling and joking, including a comment saying 'smellu'.

articles.title: Anon Claims Hinduism is Root Cause of India's Problems
articles.body:
Anon posted that Hinduism is the root cause of everything wrong with India and suggested Indians should abandon it for Islam.

Another anon responded that while they like some aspects of Islam, such as how it treats women, they don't think it's a good religion for them.

One anon suggested a temporary alliance with Bhimta to dismantle Brahminism, noting that regions with less Brahmin dominance became Buddhist and later Muslim.

Anon also claimed that India would do better under Islam, citing Kerala and Kashmir as examples of better states due to their Muslim majorities.

articles.title: Caste and region guesses shared on Indiachan
articles.body: Anon started a caste/region guessing thread. Anon identified a person as a Brahmin, another as a Baniya, and a third as a Dalit. One anon described a person from Bihar as having a "NW tier steppe" look and being "cursed by poverty". Some guesses were scattershot; Anon labeled multiple people as "Pajeet". Anon also joked about remembering a person and called another a "baman from up bihar".
